source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question and provide the correct option letter, e.g., A, B, C, D, at the end.
Question: In the AC circuit shown in the figure, \( R = X_L = 10 \Omega \). To make the power factor \( \cos \varphi = 0.707 \), what is the value of \( X_C \)?
Choices 
A. \( 5 \Omega \)  
B. \( 10 \Omega \)  
C. \( 20 \Omega \)  
D. \( 30 \Omega \)
